scripts.build:bundle: echo "@prosopo/cypress-shared: no bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:es: echo "@prosopo/cypress-shared: no es bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:iife: echo "@prosopo/cypress-shared: no iife bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.build:bundle:webpack: echo "@prosopo/cypress-shared: no webpack bundle build (not supported for this package)"
scripts.cypress:open:client-bundle-example:image: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=image CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress open --config-file cypress.image.config.js
scripts.cypress:run:client-bundle-example:image: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=image CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.image.config.js
scripts.cypress:open:client-bundle-example:frict: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=frictionless CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress open --config-file cypress.frictionless.config.js
scripts.cypress:run:client-bundle-example:fricti: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=frictionless CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --config-file cypress.frictionless.config.js --browser chrome
scripts.cypress:open:client-bundle-example:pow: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=pow CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress open --config-file cypress.pow.config.js
scripts.cypress:run:client-bundle-example:pow: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=pow CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --config-file cypress.pow.config.js --browser chrome
scripts.cypress:open:client-bundle-example:invis: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=image CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress open --config-file cypress.invisible.config.js
scripts.cypress:run:client-bundle-example:invisi: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=image CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --config-file cypress.invisible.config.js --browser chrome
scripts.cypress:baselines:image: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=image CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.image.config.js --env visualRegressionType=base
scripts.cypress:baselines:frictionless: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=frictionless CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.frictionless.config.js --env visualRegressionType=base
scripts.cypress:baselines:pow: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=pow CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.pow.config.js --env visualRegressionType=base
scripts.cypress:baselines:invisible: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CAPTCHA_TYPE=image CYPRESS_BASE_URL='https://localhost:9232' cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.invisible.config.js --env visualRegressionType=base
